items.quote: Dentagia has transformed how we run our practice. The AI-powered scheduling alone saves us 10 hours per week, and our patient satisfaction scores have never been higher.
items.author: Dr. Sarah Martinez

items.quote: Switching to Dentagia was the best decision we made. The patient management system is intuitive, billing is automated, and the analytics help us understand our practice better.
items.author: Dr. Michael Chen
